name: skilld-mcp
description: Skilld Builder Score and attestations on Solana, queryable by any AI agent.

tools.name: get_builder_score
tools.description: Resolve a Solana .sol domain to a Builder Score with breakdown by source (Colosseum hackathons, Superteam Earn bounties, GitHub commits, onchain activity, peer attestations, credentials).

domain.description: The .sol domain to query, e.g. framew0rk.sol

tools.name: list_top_builders
tools.description: Return the top N Solana builders ranked by Builder Score, optionally filtered by skill or status.

tools.name: send_intro_request
tools.description: Pay 1 USDC via x402 to send a verified intro request to a builder. Returns Solana transaction signature.

tools.name: list_attestations
tools.description: List wallet signed peer attestations for a builder.

resources.name: Top Solana Builders
resources.description: Live ranked list of top Solana builders.
